page_content:
Students are assigned an academic advisor after the schedule adjustment period. Prior to being assigned an advisor students are encouraged to email imd@umd.edu with any questions, comments, or concerns. After a student is assigned an academic advisor within Immersive Media Design, they should email their assigned advisor. The assigned advisor will work with students throughout their time in Immersive Media Design from their ﬁrst-year through graduation. All students in Immersive Media Design are required to meet with their assigned academic advisor every semester. Students make advising appointments via their TerpEngage Community (https:// terpengage.umd.edu/community/s/) portal.

Students pursuing the Bachelor of Arts are required to meet with an advisor within the College of Arts and Humanities. To learn more, please visit their advising webpage (https://arhu.umd.edu/academics/ advising/).
